case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. PHILLIP P WILEY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILEY, PHILLIP P $2,944.25 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,228.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
